name: FRM: Wizard Percussion
description: Euclidean + Perlin noise drum sequencer with 3 switchable voices and logistic chaos/swing

knobs.7: HiHat Perlin Y offset (shifts pattern in noise space)
knobs.8: Snare Perlin Y offset (shifts pattern in noise space)

switches.1: Kick model (up=808, center=909, down=basic tone drum)
switches.2: Snare model (up=808, center=909, down=basic noise drum)

cv_in.3: Kick pitch V/oct (wraps within 1 octave, base = C2 / 65 Hz)

gate_in.1: External clock (overrides internal BPM when present)
gate_in.2: Open hihat trigger (forces long decay on next hit)

leds: 16-step sequencer position across 8 LEDs (2 steps per LED)
audio_in: Summed with drum synthesis output (stereo passthrough)
audio_out: Stereo kick + snare + panned hihat mix
